PhilosophySlogan: We only live our life once.
PhilosophyMessage1:
We should dedicate ourself into construct a healthy life and keep creating a best version of ourselves.

Busy life and pressure most of the time lead us to neglect physical issues. (muscle and stamina). That body that has accompanied you through your eﬀorts for so long is actually what needs your care and attention the most.

The quality of our life has often already noticeably declined when we notice red marks, sarcopenia, fatty liver, changes in body shape, or declining stamina..etc.

"BEYOND is committed to helping every client achieve their goals and transform themselves to the best."We help our clients regain the wellness, energy, and smile they used to have.We believe everyone can become who they want to be with our professional.
PhilosophyMessage2:
Better living through Beyond.
We sincerely invite you to join us!
BusinessSlogan: Create Personal Value <br class="d-block d-lg-none d-md-none"/>Through Excercise
BusinessMessage:
BEYOND has been focusing on customized fitness services since 2014, entering its 12th year.

Starting with its Taipei Nanjing Arena branch (2014), then has expanded to five branches: Zhongxiao (2016), Dongmen (2017), Xinyi Anhe (2020), and Dazhi (2024). In 2025, BEYOND also expand ourselves into the medical field, establishing “XI Physical Therapy Clinic near Xinyi Anhe MRT Station to integrate medical care and sports-integrated services in order to providing clients with the most comprehensive and safe professional services. BEYOND has professional team exceeds 80 members right away, and has already provided customized services to over 10,000 clients.

BEYOND has organizational structure, internal sports science mechanism , and medical team support, focusing on providing clients with the most comprehensive one-on-one customized fitness training (Physical massage recovery, injury prevention, physical therapy injury referral integration, etc.).

BEYOND also serves as a professional health consultant for many well-known companies. BEYOND now is the largest and well-established one-on-one customized fitness training institution in Taiwan. We are dedicated to providing best professional personal training.

Our in-house professional coaches are internationally certified and undergo weekly, monthly, and quarterly internal professional training and assessments.

Therefore, whatever your goals is, we are confident in providing you with a unique fitness experience.

For us, sports are not just a serious matter, and also an opportunity to achieve goals and change lives with a joyful environment.
VisionSlogan: Change the World <br class="d-block d-lg-none d-md-none"/>from BEYOND!
VisionMessage:
Beyond's future vision: We strive to be a world-renowned private fitness institution that integrates health, public welfare, and technology.

  • On health:
    We cater to the personal well-being of individuals from childhood to seniors through personalized fitness plans, preventative healthcare, and psychological support.
  • On public welfare:
    Backcountry services/Community care/remote online services Beyond organizes sports competitions with social impact every year. We aim to build a network for accessible healthcare support in remote areas, reaching broader communities in need.
  • On Technology:
    Our data-driven approach leverages personal medical data, lifestyle and health risk factors, and detailed sports activity data to develop personalized health plans that promote individual well-being.
